text: Unlike opposite, disease implies An abnormal condition of a human, animal or plant that causes discomfort or dysfunction; distinct from injury insofar as the latter is usually instantaneously acquired..
The word "symptom" refers to A perceived change in some function, sensation or appearance of a person that indicates a disease or disorder, such as fever, headache or rash..
Indication is similar to symptom, meaning A perceived change in some function, sensation or appearance of a person that indicates a disease or disorder, such as fever, headache or rash.
Manifestation is similar to symptom, meaning A perceived change in some function, sensation or appearance of a person that indicates a disease or disorder, such as fever, headache or rash.
The term treatment can be understood as The process or manner of treating someone or something..
What does medicine mean? It means A substance which specifically promotes healing when ingested or consumed in some way..
Drug is similar to medicine, meaning A substance which specifically promotes healing when ingested or consumed in some way.
Elixir is similar to medicine, meaning A substance which specifically promotes healing when ingested or consumed in some way.
In the context of 医疗, diagnosis is defined as To determine which disease is causing a sick person's signs and symptoms; to find the diagnosis..
surgery means A procedure involving major incisions to remove, repair, or replace a part of a body..
Office is similar to surgery, meaning A procedure involving major incisions to remove, repair, or replace a part of a body.
Operation is similar to surgery, meaning A procedure involving major incisions to remove, repair, or replace a part of a body.
Unlike opposite, hospital implies A large medical facility, usually in a building with multiple floors, where seriously ill or injured patients are given extensive medical and/or surgical treatment..

Infirmary is similar to hospital, meaning A large medical facility, usually in a building with multiple floors, where seriously ill or injured patients are given extensive medical and/or surgical treatment.

Sickhouse is similar to hospital, meaning A large medical facility, usually in a building with multiple floors, where seriously ill or injured patients are given extensive medical and/or surgical treatment.

Unlike opposite, doctor implies A physician; a member of the medical profession; one who is trained and licensed to heal the sick or injured. The final examination and qualification may award a doctor degree in which case the post-nominal letters are D.O., DPM, M.D., DMD, DDS, in the US or MBBS in the UK..

Gp is similar to doctor, meaning A physician; a member of the medical profession; one who is trained and licensed to heal the sick or injured. The final examination and qualification may award a doctor degree in which case the post-nominal letters are D.O., DPM, M.D., DMD, DDS, in the US or MBBS in the UK.

The final examination and qualification may award a doctor degree in which case the post-nominal letters are D.O., DPM, M.D., DMD, DDS, in the US or MBBS in the UK.
patient means A person or animal who receives treatment from a doctor or other medically educated person..
